<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_rule_codes_doc.py. Do not edit by hand. -->

# Rule codes

Every built-in check has a unique rule code: a two-letter prefix identifying the group of resources it applies to, followed by a three-digit number. Codes are stable â€” once published, a code always refers to the same check.

## Referencing a check by its code

Anywhere a check is named you may use its code instead. These two config entries are equivalent:

```yaml
manifest_checks:
  - name: check_model_description_populated
  - code: MO021
```

Codes are also accepted in the `skip_checks` meta key on a dbt resource:

```yaml
models:
  - name: my_model
    meta:
      skip_checks:
        - MO021
```

To browse codes from the command line, use [`dbt-bouncer list`](../cli.md), optionally filtered with `--group`:

```shell
dbt-bouncer list --group manifest_checks
```

## Prefixes

| Prefix | Group | Config category | Checks |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `CA` | Catalog | `catalog_checks` | 11 |
| `EX` | Exposures | `manifest_checks` | 6 |
| `LI` | Lineage | `manifest_checks` | 3 |
| `MA` | Macros | `manifest_checks` | 10 |
| `ME` | Metadata | `manifest_checks` | 1 |
| `MO` | Models | `manifest_checks` | 47 |
| `RR` | Run results | `run_results_checks` | 2 |
| `SE` | Seeds | `manifest_checks` | 6 |
| `SM` | Semantic models | `manifest_checks` | 1 |
| `SN` | Snapshots | `manifest_checks` | 6 |
| `SO` | Sources | `manifest_checks` | 17 |
| `TE` | Tests | `manifest_checks` | 3 |
| `UT` | Unit tests | `manifest_checks` | 3 |

## Catalog (`CA`)

| Code | Check | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `CA001` | `check_seed_columns_are_all_documented` | All columns in a seed CSV file should be included in the seed's properties file, i.e. `.yml` file. |
| `CA002` | `check_seed_max_bytes` | Each seed must not exceed the given size in bytes. |
| `CA003` | `check_seed_max_row_count` | Each seed must not contain more than the given number of rows. |
| `CA004` | `check_source_columns_are_all_documented` | All columns in a source should be included in the source's properties file, i.e. `.yml` file. |
| `CA005` | `check_column_description_populated` | Columns must have a populated description. |
| `CA006` | `check_columns_are_all_documented` | All columns in a model should be included in the model's properties file, i.e. `.yml` file. |
| `CA007` | `check_columns_are_documented_in_public_models` | Columns should have a populated description in public models. |
| `CA008` | `check_column_name_complies_to_column_type` | Columns with the specified regexp naming pattern must have data types that comply to the specified regexp pattern or list of data types. |
| `CA009` | `check_column_names` | Columns must have a name that matches the supplied regex. |
| `CA010` | `check_column_type_complies_to_column_name` | Columns with the specified data type must have names that comply to the specified regexp pattern. |
| `CA011` | `check_column_has_specified_test` | Columns that match the specified regexp pattern must have a specified test. |

## Exposures (`EX`)

| Code | Check | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `EX001` | `check_exposure_based_on_model` | Exposures should depend on a model. |
| `EX002` | `check_exposure_based_on_non_public_models` | Exposures should be based on public models only. |
| `EX003` | `check_exposure_based_on_view` | Exposures should not be based on views. |
| `EX004` | `check_exposure_description_populated` | Exposures must have a populated description. |
| `EX005` | `check_exposure_has_meta_keys` | The `meta` config for exposures must have the specified keys. |
| `EX006` | `check_exposure_has_owner` | Exposures must have owner information populated. |

## Lineage (`LI`)

| Code | Check | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `LI001` | `check_lineage_permitted_upstream_models` | Upstream models must have a path that matches the provided `upstream_path_pattern`. |
| `LI002` | `check_lineage_seed_cannot_be_used` | Seed cannot be referenced in models with a path that matches the specified `include` config. |
| `LI003` | `check_lineage_source_cannot_be_used` | Sources cannot be referenced in models with a path that matches the specified `include` config. |

## Macros (`MA`)

| Code | Check | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `MA001` | `check_macro_arguments_description_populated` | Macro arguments must have a populated description. |
| `MA002` | `check_macro_code_does_not_contain_regexp_pattern` | The raw code for a macro must not match the specified regexp pattern. |
| `MA003` | `check_macro_description_populated` | Macros must have a populated description. |
| `MA004` | `check_macro_has_meta_keys` | The `meta` config for macros must have the specified keys. |
| `MA005` | `check_macro_is_used` | Macros must be invoked by at least one other resource. |
| `MA006` | `check_macro_max_number_of_arguments` | Macros may not have more than the specified number of arguments. |
| `MA007` | `check_macro_max_number_of_lines` | Macros may not have more than the specified number of lines. |
| `MA008` | `check_macro_name_matches_file_name` | Macros names must be the same as the file they are contained in. |
| `MA009` | `check_macro_names` | Macros must have a name that matches the supplied regex. |
| `MA010` | `check_macro_property_file_location` | Macro properties files must follow the guidance provided by dbt [here](https://docs.getdbt.com/best-practices/how-we-structure/5-the-rest-of-the-project#how-we-use-the-other-folders). |

## Metadata (`ME`)

| Code | Check | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `ME001` | `check_project_name` | Enforce that the name of the dbt project matches a supplied regex. Generally used to enforce that project names conform to something like  `company_<DOMAIN>`. |

## Models (`MO`)

| Code | Check | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `MO001` | `check_model_access` | Models must have the specified access attribute. Requires dbt 1.7+. |
| `MO002` | `check_model_contract_enforced_for_public_model` | Public models must have contracts enforced. |
| `MO003` | `check_model_grant_privilege` | Model can have grant privileges that match the specified pattern. |
| `MO004` | `check_model_grant_privilege_required` | Model must have the specified grant privilege. |
| `MO005` | `check_model_has_contracts_enforced` | Model must have contracts enforced. |
| `MO006` | `check_model_number_of_grants` | Model can have the specified number of privileges. |
| `MO007` | `check_model_code_does_not_contain_regexp_pattern` | The raw code for a model must not match the specified regexp pattern. |
| `MO008` | `check_model_does_not_use_select_star` | Models must not use `SELECT *`. |
| `MO009` | `check_model_hard_coded_references` | A model must not contain hard-coded table references; use ref() or source() instead. |
| `MO010` | `check_model_has_semi_colon` | Model may not end with a semi-colon (`;`). |
| `MO011` | `check_model_incremental_has_unique_key` | Incremental models must declare a `unique_key`. |
| `MO012` | `check_model_materialization_permitted` | Models must use a permitted materialization for their location. |
| `MO013` | `check_model_max_number_of_lines` | Models may not have more than the specified number of lines. |
| `MO014` | `check_model_columns_have_meta_keys` | Columns defined for models must have the specified keys in the `meta` config. |
| `MO015` | `check_model_columns_have_relationship_tests` | Columns matching a regex pattern must have a `relationships` test, optionally validating the target column and model. |
| `MO016` | `check_model_columns_have_types` | Columns defined for models must have a `data_type` declared. |
| `MO017` | `check_model_has_constraints` | Table and incremental models must have the specified constraint types defined. |
| `MO018` | `check_model_single_primary_key` | Models must have at most one column-level primary key constraint. |
| `MO019` | `check_column_descriptions_are_consistent` | The same column name must not have conflicting descriptions across models. |
| `MO020` | `check_model_description_contains_regex_pattern` | Models must have a description that matches the provided pattern. |
| `MO021` | `check_model_description_populated` | Models must have a populated description. |
| `MO022` | `check_model_documentation_coverage` | Set the minimum percentage of models that have a populated description. |
| `MO023` | `check_model_documented_in_same_directory` | Models must be documented in the same directory where they are defined (i.e. `.yml` and `.sql` files are in the same directory). |
| `MO024` | `check_model_directories` | Only specified sub-directories are permitted. |
| `MO025` | `check_model_file_name` | Models must have a file name that matches the supplied regex. |
| `MO026` | `check_model_property_file_location` | Model properties files must follow the guidance provided by dbt [here](https://docs.getdbt.com/best-practices/how-we-structure/1-guide-overview). |
| `MO027` | `check_model_schema_name` | Models must have a schema name that matches the supplied regex. |
| `MO028` | `check_model_depends_on_macros` | Models must depend on the specified macros. |
| `MO029` | `check_model_depends_on_multiple_sources` | Models cannot reference more than one source. |
| `MO030` | `check_model_has_exposure` | Models must have an exposure. |
| `MO031` | `check_model_has_no_upstream_dependencies` | Identify if models have no upstream dependencies as this likely indicates hard-coded tables references. |
| `MO032` | `check_model_materialization_by_fanout` | Heavily-reused models must use a durable materialization. |
| `MO033` | `check_model_max_chained_views` | Models cannot have more than the specified number of upstream dependents that are not tables. |
| `MO034` | `check_model_max_fanout` | Models cannot have more than the specified number of downstream models. |
| `MO035` | `check_model_max_upstream_dependencies` | Limit the number of upstream dependencies a model has. |
| `MO036` | `check_model_has_labels_keys` | The `labels` config for models must have the specified keys. |
| `MO037` | `check_model_has_meta_keys` | The `meta` config for models must have the specified keys. |
| `MO038` | `check_model_names` | Models must have a name that matches the supplied regex. |
| `MO039` | `check_model_has_tags` | Models must have the specified tags. |
| `MO040` | `check_model_has_tests_by_name` | Models must have a minimum number of tests matching the specified test names. |
| `MO041` | `check_model_has_tests_by_type` | Models must have at least the specified number of schema tests and data tests. |
| `MO042` | `check_model_has_unique_test` | Models must have a test for uniqueness of a column. |
| `MO043` | `check_model_has_unit_tests` | Models must have more than the specified number of unit tests. |
| `MO044` | `check_model_test_coverage` | Set the minimum percentage of models that have at least one test. |
| `MO045` | `check_model_latest_version_specified` | Check that the `latest_version` attribute of the model is set. |
| `MO046` | `check_model_version_allowed` | Check that the version of the model matches the supplied regex pattern. |
| `MO047` | `check_model_version_pinned_in_ref` | Check that the version of the model is always specified in downstream nodes. |

## Run results (`RR`)

| Code | Check | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `RR001` | `check_run_results_max_execution_time` | Each result can take a maximum duration (seconds). |
| `RR002` | `check_run_results_max_gigabytes_billed` | Each result can have a maximum number of gigabytes billed. |

## Seeds (`SE`)

| Code | Check | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `SE001` | `check_seed_column_names` | Seed columns must have names that match the supplied regex. |
| `SE002` | `check_seed_columns_have_types` | Columns defined for seeds must have a `data_type` declared. |
| `SE003` | `check_seed_description_populated` | Seeds must have a populated description. |
| `SE004` | `check_seed_has_meta_keys` | The `meta` config for seeds must have the specified keys. |
| `SE005` | `check_seed_has_unit_tests` | Seeds must have more than the specified number of unit tests. |
| `SE006` | `check_seed_names` | Seed must have a name that matches the supplied regex. |

## Semantic models (`SM`)

| Code | Check | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `SM001` | `check_semantic_model_based_on_non_public_models` | Semantic models should be based on public models only. |

## Snapshots (`SN`)

| Code | Check | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `SN001` | `check_snapshot_description_populated` | Snapshots must have a populated description. |
| `SN002` | `check_snapshot_has_meta_keys` | The `meta` config for snapshots must have the specified keys. |
| `SN003` | `check_snapshot_has_tags` | Snapshots must have the specified tags. |
| `SN004` | `check_snapshot_has_unique_key` | Snapshots must have a `unique_key` configured. |
| `SN005` | `check_snapshot_names` | Snapshots must have a name that matches the supplied regex. |
| `SN006` | `check_snapshot_strategy` | Snapshots must use an allowed strategy and have the required strategy-specific configuration. |

## Sources (`SO`)

| Code | Check | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `SO001` | `check_source_description_populated` | Sources must have a populated description. |
| `SO002` | `check_source_file_name` | Sources must have a file name that matches the supplied regex. |
| `SO003` | `check_source_property_file_location` | Source properties files must follow the guidance provided by dbt [here](https://docs.getdbt.com/best-practices/how-we-structure/1-guide-overview). |
| `SO004` | `check_source_freshness_populated` | Sources must have a populated freshness. |
| `SO005` | `check_duplicate_sources` | Sources must not share the same database relation. |
| `SO006` | `check_source_min_downstream_models` | Sources must be referenced by at least the specified number of models. |
| `SO007` | `check_source_not_orphaned` | Sources must be referenced in at least one model. |
| `SO008` | `check_source_used_by_models_in_same_directory` | Sources can only be referenced by models that are located in the same directory where the source is defined. |
| `SO009` | `check_source_used_by_only_one_model` | Each source can be referenced by a maximum of one model. |
| `SO010` | `check_source_loader_populated` | Sources must have a populated loader. |
| `SO011` | `check_source_has_labels_keys` | The `labels` config for sources must have the specified keys. |
| `SO012` | `check_source_has_meta_keys` | The `meta` config for sources must have the specified keys. |
| `SO013` | `check_source_pii_meta` | Source columns matching a PII pattern must carry a governance meta key. |
| `SO014` | `check_source_names` | Sources must have a name that matches the supplied regex. |
| `SO015` | `check_source_has_tags` | Sources must have the specified tags. |
| `SO016` | `check_source_has_tests` | Sources must have a minimum number of tests. |
| `SO017` | `check_source_top_level_description_populated` | Sources must have a populated description on the top-level `sources:` entry. |

## Tests (`TE`)

| Code | Check | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `TE001` | `check_test_has_meta_keys` | The `meta` config for data tests must have the specified keys. |
| `TE002` | `check_test_has_tags` | Data tests must have the specified tags. |
| `TE003` | `check_test_has_where_config` | Data tests must have a `where` config set. |

## Unit tests (`UT`)

| Code | Check | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `UT001` | `check_unit_test_coverage` | Set the minimum percentage of models that have a unit test. |
| `UT002` | `check_unit_test_expect_format` | Unit tests can only use the specified formats. |
| `UT003` | `check_unit_test_given_formats` | Unit tests can only use the specified formats. |
